videos.headline: TCU gets the better of Oklahoma State
videos.description: Darius Anderson led the Horned Frogs with three rushing touchdowns and 160 yards in a 44-31 victory as Oklahoma State's offense was held in check.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (TCU gets the better of Oklahoma State) 2017/9/23 ESHEET ENHL

videos.headline: Rudolph goes deep for the TD
videos.description: Oklahoma State's Mason Rudolph hurls it downfield to find James Washington for the 86-yard touchdown to give the Cowboys the lead in the first quarter.

videos.headline: TCU's Anderson weaves his way into the end zone
videos.description: TCU's Darius Anderson shakes around the Oklahoma State defense to get the 28-yard touchdown.

videos.headline: Rudolph fumbles the ball
videos.description: Oklahoma State's Mason Rudolph does not feel the pressure from TCU's defense and fumbles the ball as he is tackled.

videos.headline: TCU jumps out to halftime lead in Stillwater
videos.description: No. 6 Oklahoma State fell behind to No. 16 TCU in a first half full of big plays.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (TCU jumps out to halftime lead in Stillwater) 2017/09/23 ESHEET

videos.headline: Rudolph picked off by TCU
videos.description: Oklahoma State's Mason Rudolph throws an interception to TCU's Chris Bradley, who makes a great play to force the turnover.

videos.headline: TCU finds TD success with the option
videos.description: TCU's Kenny Hill runs the option and dumps it to Darius Anderson, who stays upright to get into the end zone.

videos.headline: Rudolph helps Oklahoma State's offense with TD pass
videos.description: Oklahoma State's Mason Rudolph finds Dillon Stoner in the end zone for the 14-yard touchdown as the Cowboys continue to trail TCU in the third quarter.

videos.headline: TCU barely gets into the end zone
videos.description: TCU's Sewo Olonilua just barely gets the tip of the football to cross the goal line to extend the Horned Frogs' lead.

videos.headline: Oklahoma State throws a 'gift' to TCU
videos.description: Oklahoma State runs a trick play to no success as TCU picks the ball off in the red zone.

videos.headline: TCU seals it with long touchdown run
videos.description: TCU's Darius Anderson runs 42 yards into the end zone for his third score against Oklahoma State, and Cowboys fans leave the stadium disappointed.

videos.headline: TCU silences Oklahoma State
videos.description: No. 16 TCU improves to 4-0 behind Darius Anderson's 160 yards and three scores on the ground, sending Oklahoma State to its first loss of the season.

videos.headline: TCU recovers fumbled punt
videos.description: Oklahoma State's Rodarius Williams fumbles the punt and TCU recovers.

videos.headline: OKST VS TCU
Oklahoma State picks off Hill
videos.description: TCU's Kenny Hill overthrows his receiver and Oklahoma State makes the interception.

videos.headline: TCU's Austin refuses to go down on big gain
videos.description: TCU's Kenny Hill finds Jaelan Austin, who refuses to be tackled, for the 43-yard catch.

videos.headline: OKST VS TCU
McCleskey makes the bobbling catch
videos.description: Oklahoma State's Jalen McCleskey makes the athletic catch to set up the Cowboys in the red zone.

videos.headline: Hill runs it in for the Cowboys
videos.description: Oklahoma State's Justice Hill runs into the end zone to bring the Cowboys within one score against TCU in the fourth quarter.

videos.headline: OKST VS TCU
Patterson speaks on positive first half
videos.description: TCU head coach Gary Patterson praises strong performance of his Horned Frogs against Oklahoma State in the first half.
